canonical_definition: Dataset of approximately 225,000 English math problems paired with verified long chain-of-thought reasoning traces generated by DeepSeek-R1, used for supervised fine-tuning.
papers: Beyond Human Labels: A Multi-Linguistic Auto-Generated Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Models on Resume Parsing
Improving Reasoning Capabilities in Small Models through Mixture-of-layers Distillation with Stepwise Attention on Key Information
